headline: A Look At Ingersoll Rand (IR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot Ingersoll Rand (IR) has stayed in focus after a recent stretch of weaker price performance, with the stock down about 7% over the past week and about 19% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Ingersoll Rand. The recent pullback fits into a broader cooling in momentum, with the 90 day share price return down 27.1%, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 49.62% still paints a more positive long term picture. If recent volatility has you reassessing...
